verses.latin_vulgate: Verba mea auribus percipe, Domine ;  intellige clamorem meum.
verses.king_james: Give ear to my words, O Lord, consider my meditation.

verses.latin_vulgate: Intende voci orationis meæ,  rex meus et Deus meus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַקְשִׁ֤יבָה ׀ לְק֬וֹל שַׁוְעִ֗י מַלְכִּ֥י וֵאלֹהָ֑י כִּֽי־אֵ֝לֶ֗יךָ אֶתְפַּלָּֽל׃
verses.king_james: Hearken unto the voice of my cry, my King, and my God: for unto thee will I pray.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam ad te orabo, Domine :  mane exaudies vocem meam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְֽהֹוָ֗ה בֹּ֭קֶר תִּשְׁמַ֣ע קוֹלִ֑י בֹּ֥קֶר אֶעֱרׇךְ־לְ֝ךָ֗ וַאֲצַפֶּֽה׃
verses.king_james: My voice shalt thou hear in the morning, O Lord; in the morning will I direct my prayer unto thee, and will look up.

verses.latin_vulgate: Mane astabo tibi, et videbo  quoniam non Deus volens iniquitatem tu es.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י ׀ לֹ֤א אֵֽל־חָפֵ֘ץ־רֶ֥שַׁע ׀ אָ֑תָּה לֹ֖א יְגֻרְךָ֣ רָֽע׃
verses.king_james: For thou art not a God that hath pleasure in wickedness: neither shall evil dwell with thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Neque habitabit juxta te malignus,  neque permanebunt injusti ante oculos tuos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹֽא־יִתְיַצְּב֣וּ ה֭וֹלְלִים לְנֶ֣גֶד עֵינֶ֑יךָ שָׂ֝נֵ֗אתָ כׇּל־פֹּ֥עֲלֵי אָֽוֶן׃
verses.king_james: The foolish shall not stand in thy sight: thou hatest all workers of iniquity.

verses.latin_vulgate: Odisti omnes qui operantur iniquitatem ;  perdes omnes qui loquuntur mendacium.  Virum sanguinum et dolosum abominabitur Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תְּאַבֵּד֮ דֹּבְרֵ֢י כָ֫זָ֥ב אִישׁ־דָּמִ֥ים וּמִרְמָ֗ה יְתָ֘עֵ֥ב ׀ יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Thou shalt destroy them that speak leasing: the Lord will abhor the bloody and deceitful man.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ego autem in multitudine misericordiæ tuæ  introibo in domum tuam ;  adorabo ad templum sanctum tuum in timore tuo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲנִ֗י בְּרֹ֣ב חַ֭סְדְּךָ אָב֣וֹא בֵיתֶ֑ךָ אֶשְׁתַּחֲוֶ֥ה אֶל־הֵֽיכַל־קׇ֝דְשְׁךָ֗ בְּיִרְאָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: But as for me, I will come into thy house in the multitude of thy mercy: and in thy fear will I worship toward thy holy temple.

verses.latin_vulgate: Domine, deduc me in justitia tua :  propter inimicos meos dirige in conspectu tuo viam meam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהֹוָ֤ה ׀ נְחֵ֬נִי בְצִדְקָתֶ֗ךָ לְמַ֥עַן שׁוֹרְרָ֑י (הושר) [הַיְשַׁ֖ר] לְפָנַ֣י דַּרְכֶּֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: Lead me, O Lord, in thy righteousness because of mine enemies; make thy way straight before my face.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam non est in ore eorum veritas ;  cor eorum vanum est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י אֵ֪ין בְּפִ֡יהוּ נְכוֹנָה֮ קִרְבָּ֢ם הַ֫וּ֥וֹת קֶֽבֶר־פָּת֥וּחַ גְּרֹנָ֑ם לְ֝שׁוֹנָ֗ם יַחֲלִיקֽוּן׃
verses.king_james: For there is no faithfulness in their mouth; their inward part is very wickedness; their throat is an open sepulchre; they flatter with their tongue.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sepulchrum patens est guttur eorum ;  linguis suis dolose agebant :  judica illos, Deus.  Decidant a cogitationibus suis ;  secundum multitudinem impietatum eorum expelle eos,  quoniam irritaverunt te, Domine.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַ֥אֲשִׁימֵ֨ם ׀ אֱֽלֹהִ֗ים יִפְּלוּ֮ מִֽמֹּעֲצ֢וֹתֵ֫יהֶ֥ם בְּרֹ֣ב פִּ֭שְׁעֵיהֶם הַדִּיחֵ֑מוֹ כִּי־מָ֥רוּ בָֽךְ׃
verses.king_james: Destroy thou them, O God; let them fall by their own counsels; cast them out in the multitude of their transgressions; for they have rebelled against thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et lætentur omnes qui sperant in te ;  in æternum exsultabunt, et habitabis in eis.  Et gloriabuntur in te omnes qui diligunt nomen tuum,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיִשְׂמְח֨וּ כׇל־ח֪וֹסֵי בָ֡ךְ לְעוֹלָ֣ם יְ֭רַנֵּנוּ וְתָסֵ֣ךְ עָלֵ֑ימוֹ וְֽיַעְלְצ֥וּ בְ֝ךָ֗ אֹהֲבֵ֥י שְׁמֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: But let all those that put their trust in thee rejoice: let them ever shout for joy, because thou defendest them: let them also that love thy name be joyful in thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: quoniam tu benedices justo.  Domine, ut scuto bonæ voluntatis tuæ coronasti nos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־אַתָּה֮ תְּבָרֵ֢ךְ צַ֫דִּ֥יק יְהֹוָ֑ה כַּ֝צִּנָּ֗ה רָצ֥וֹן תַּעְטְרֶֽנּוּ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: For thou, Lord, wilt bless the righteous; with favour wilt thou compass him as with a shield.
